aligned_lyrics.text: Fog drawing ghosts on the window
Tracing your name till it bleeds
Run like code across the glass
But my hands still stuck in the past
City smears out like your face
Little warmth where you used to sit
I say "keep going" just to stay
Out in the blur a while longer
Stretching the night like a wave
Watch them dissolve with the dawn
City smears out like your face
Little warmth where you used to sit
If love was just a glitch
Why you still buzzing in my ear?
Tell me this ride ends somewhere
Turns into you just the same
City smears out like your face
Little warmth where you used to sit
